key_sentences.english: Athletes with good results all achieve success on the field through persistence and hard work.

grammar_points.title: 尽管...还是... — Even though...still... (e.g. 尽管很累，还是坚持)
grammar_points.explanation: 尽管...还是... expresses a concession: even though the first clause presents a difficulty or obstacle, the result in the second clause still holds. 尽管 introduces the concessive clause, and 还是 introduces the consistent outcome. Structure: 尽管 + obstacle/difficulty + 还是 + result. 尽管比赛很难，他还是赢了 - Even though the competition was very difficult, he still won.

examples.chinese: 尽管训练非常辛苦，这位运动员还是坚持完成了所有课程。
examples.pinyin: Jǐn guǎn xùn liàn fēi cháng xīn kǔ, zhè wèi yùn dòng yuán hái shì jiān chí wán chéng le suǒ yǒu kè chéng.
examples.english: Even though the training was very tough, this athlete still persisted and completed all the sessions.

examples.chinese: 尽管赛场上竞争激烈，她还是发挥出了最好的体能水平。
examples.pinyin: Jǐn guǎn sài chǎng shàng jìng zhēng jī liè, tā hái shì fā huī chū le zuì hǎo de tǐ néng shuǐ píng.
examples.english: Even though the competition at the arena was fierce, she still performed at her best physical level.

exercises.question: 尽管比赛成绩不理想，他 _____ 没有放弃训练。

options: 尽管体育馆很远，他还是每天坚持去锻炼。
还是体育馆很远，他尽管每天坚持去锻炼。
他体育馆尽管很远，每天还是坚持去锻炼。
尽管他还是，体育馆很远每天坚持去锻炼。
option_pinyin: Jǐn guǎn tǐ yù guǎn hěn yuǎn, tā hái shì měi tiān jiān chí qù duàn liàn.
Hái shì tǐ yù guǎn hěn yuǎn, tā jǐn guǎn měi tiān jiān chí qù duàn liàn.
Tā tǐ yù guǎn jǐn guǎn hěn yuǎn, měi tiān hái shì jiān chí qù duàn liàn.
Jǐn guǎn tā hái shì, tǐ yù guǎn hěn yuǎn měi tiān jiān chí qù duàn liàn.

Something happening as soon as another thing happens

mini_exercises.correct: Even though A is true, B still happens — a concession with an unexpected continuation
options: Even though A is true, B still happens — a concession with an unexpected continuation
Because A is true, B happens — a cause-effect relationship
As long as A, then B — a sufficient condition
Only if A, then B — a necessary condition

grammar_points.title: 看来 — It seems / It appears (parenthetical 插入语)
grammar_points.explanation:
看来 functions as a parenthetical (插入语) — an inserted comment that expresses the speaker's inference or estimation based on what they can observe. It is equivalent to "it seems", "it looks as if", or "it appears".

Three positions in a sentence:

1. Sentence-initial (most common):
• 看来，这次比赛竞争非常激烈。
  (It seems this competition is very intense.)

2. After the subject:
• 他，看来，已经是最强的运动员了。
  (He, it seems, is already the strongest athlete.)

3. After an evidence clause:
• 他训练那么刻苦，看来冠军非他莫属。
  (He trains so hard; it seems the championship belongs to no one but him.)

Note: 看来 reflects the speaker's personal judgment — it is not a fixed fact.

examples.chinese: 他跑得那么快，看来打破纪录不是问题。
examples.pinyin: tā pǎo dé nà me kuài kàn lái dǎ pò jì lù bú shì wèn tí
examples.english: He runs so fast; it seems breaking the record is not a problem.

examples.chinese: 看来，良性竞争真的能提高运动员的整体水平。
examples.pinyin: kàn lái liáng xìng jìng zhēng zhēn de néng tí gāo yùn dòng yuán de zhěng tǐ shuǐ píng
examples.english: It appears that healthy competition can indeed raise athletes' overall level.

examples.chinese: 教练这么满意，看来今天的训练非常成功。
examples.pinyin: jiào liàn zhè me mǎn yì kàn lái jīn tiān de xùn liàn fēi cháng chéng gōng
examples.english: The coach seems so satisfied; it looks like today's training was very successful.

他看来训练了，冠军刻苦非他莫属。
看来了他训练刻苦，冠军莫属。
冠军看来非他莫属，训练刻苦。

culture_notes.title: China's Sports Culture and the Olympic Legacy
culture_notes.title_chinese: 中国体育文化与奥运精神
culture_notes.content: China has a rich sports culture that blends ancient tradition with modern competitive achievement. Traditional martial arts such as 武术 (wǔ shù) and 太极拳 (Tài Jí Quán) remain popular forms of daily exercise in parks and community spaces. At the competitive level, China has become one of the world's leading sports nations. Hosting the 2008 Beijing Summer Olympics was a defining moment — China topped the gold medal tally, demonstrating exceptional 运动员 (athletes) and rigorous 训练 (training) systems. The 2022 Beijing Winter Olympics further highlighted China's growing strength in winter sports. Chinese athletes are known for their dedication (坚持) and discipline, often training from a young age under experienced 教练 (coaches) at dedicated sports schools.

idioms.pinyin: gèng kuài, gèng gāo, gèng qiáng

quiz.question: What does 坚持 mean?
quiz.correct: To persist; to keep at it
options: To persist; to keep at it

quiz.question: Fill in the blank: 只要认真训练，_____ 能提高体能。
What does 只要...就... express?
quiz.correct: A sufficient condition — as long as X happens, Y follows
options: A sufficient condition — as long as X happens, Y follows
An obstacle that doesn't prevent the result

quiz.question: Fill in the blank: 尽管比赛很艰难，她 _____ 坚持到了终点。
What does 尽管...还是... express?
quiz.correct: Even though there is an obstacle, the result still holds
options: Even though there is an obstacle, the result still holds
As long as a condition is met, a result follows

Fill in: 在教练的指导下，运动员刻苦训练，最终 _____ 了冠军。

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 加缪，明天就是比赛了，我有点紧张。
lines.pinyin: Jiā miù, míng tiān jiù shì bǐ sài le, wǒ yǒu diǎn jǐn zhāng.
lines.english: Camus, the competition is tomorrow — I'm a little nervous.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 紧张是正常的。只要你发挥出平时训练的水平，就一定能取得好成绩。
lines.pinyin: Jǐn zhāng shì zhèng cháng de. Zhǐ yào nǐ fā huī chū píng shí xùn liàn de shuǐ píng, jiù yí dìng néng qǔ dé hǎo chéng jì.
lines.english: It's normal to be nervous. As long as you perform at the level you've trained to, you will definitely achieve a good result.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 这次赛场上的竞争很激烈，对手的体能也很强。
lines.pinyin: Zhè cì sài chǎng shàng de jìng zhēng hěn jī liè, duì shǒu de tǐ néng yě hěn qiáng.
lines.english: The competition at the arena this time is very intense, and the opponents also have strong physical fitness.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 尽管对手很强，你还是要相信自己。你一到赛场就会进入状态的。
lines.pinyin: Jǐn guǎn duì shǒu hěn qiáng, nǐ hái shì yào xiāng xìn zì jǐ. Nǐ yí dào sài chǎng jiù huì jìn rù zhuàng tài de.
lines.english: Even though the opponents are strong, you still need to believe in yourself. As soon as you get to the arena, you'll get into the zone.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 这几个月的刻苦训练，希望能帮助我打破个人记录。
lines.pinyin: Zhè jǐ gè yuè de kè kǔ xùn liàn, xī wàng néng bāng zhù wǒ dǎ pò gè rén jì lù.
lines.english: These months of rigorous training — I hope they will help me break my personal record.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 只要你坚持，就有机会赢得冠军。我们在体育馆里准备得很充分，你有实力的！
lines.pinyin: Zhǐ yào nǐ jiān chí, jiù yǒu jī huì yíng dé guàn jūn. Wǒ men zài tǐ yù guǎn lǐ zhǔn bèi de hěn chōng fèn, nǐ yǒu shí lì de!
lines.english: As long as you persist, you have a chance to win the championship. We prepared thoroughly in the gymnasium — you have what it takes!

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 谢谢！不管比赛结果怎样，我都会全力以赴，不留遗憾。
lines.pinyin: Xiè xie! Bù guǎn bǐ sài jié guǒ zěn yàng, wǒ dōu huì quán lì yǐ fù, bù liú yí hàn.
lines.english: Thank you! No matter what the result is, I will give my all and leave no regrets.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 好！一上赛场，就忘掉压力，享受比赛的过程！加油！
lines.pinyin: Hǎo! Yí shàng sài chǎng, jiù wàng diào yā lì, xiǎng shòu bǐ sài de guò chéng! Jiā yóu!
lines.english: Good! As soon as you step onto the arena, forget the pressure and enjoy the competition process! Go for it!

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 苏轼，你最近每天去体育馆训练，感觉体能提高了吗？
lines.pinyin: Sū Shì, nǐ zuì jìn měi tiān qù tǐ yù guǎn xùn liàn, gǎn jué tǐ néng tí gāo le ma?
lines.english: Su Shi, you've been going to the gymnasium to train every day lately — do you feel your physical fitness has improved?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 确实，我坚持了两个月，感觉越来越好了。只要坚持，就一定有效果。
lines.pinyin: Què shí, wǒ jiān chí le liǎng gè yuè, gǎn jué yuè lái yuè hǎo le. Zhǐ yào jiān chí, jiù yí dìng yǒu xiào guǒ.
lines.english: Indeed — I've persisted for two months and feel better and better. As long as you persist, there will definitely be results.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 我想参加下个月的Hyrox健身比赛，但感觉自己的体能还不够。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng cān jiā xià gè yuè de hyrox jiàn shēn bǐ sài, dàn gǎn jué zì jǐ de tǐ néng hái bú gòu.
lines.english: I want to enter next month's Hyrox fitness competition, but I feel my physical fitness isn't good enough yet.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 尽管时间短，还是可以集中训练提高的。你有没有找教练指导？
lines.pinyin: Jǐn guǎn shí jiān duǎn, hái shì kě yǐ jí zhōng xùn liàn tí gāo de. Nǐ yǒu méi yǒu zhǎo jiào liàn zhǐ dǎo?
lines.english: Even though time is short, you can still improve through intensive training. Have you found a coach to guide you?

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 还没有。你觉得只要有好教练，效果就能提高吗？
lines.pinyin: Hái méi yǒu. Nǐ jué de zhǐ yào yǒu hǎo jiào liàn, xiào guǒ jiù néng tí gāo ma?
lines.english: Not yet. Do you think that as long as you have a good coach, results can improve?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 教练很重要，但最关键的还是自己要坚持。我一到体育馆，就会忘掉所有烦恼。
lines.pinyin: Jiào liàn hěn zhòng yào, dàn zuì guān jiàn de hái shì zì jǐ yào jiān chí. Wǒ yí dào tǐ yù guǎn, jiù huì wàng diào suǒ yǒu fán nǎo.
lines.english: A coach is important, but the most key thing is still to persist yourself. As soon as I get to the gymnasium, I forget all my worries.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 那我决定了，从今天开始，每天去体育馆训练，争取打破自己的记录！
lines.pinyin: Nà wǒ jué dìng le, cóng jīn tiān kāi shǐ, měi tiān qù tǐ yù guǎn xùn liàn, zhēng qǔ dǎ pò zì jǐ de jì lù!
lines.english: Then I've made up my mind — starting from today, I'll go to the gymnasium every day and strive to break my own record!
